positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~appear_today(james)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~manager(james)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define employee(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define remote(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define lunch_home(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define lunch_building(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define schedule_meeting(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define go_to_building(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_other_country(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u30,axiom,
    ~appear_today(james)).

cnf(u33,axiom,
    ~manager(james)).

cnf(u20,axiom,
    ~employee(X0) | lunch_home(X0) | lunch_building(X0)).

cnf(u25,axiom,
    employee(james)).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    ~manager(X0) | ~remote(X0)).

cnf(u26,negated_conjecture,
    ~lunch_building(james)).

cnf(u39,negated_conjecture,
    remote(james)).

cnf(u38,negated_conjecture,
    lunch_home(james)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    ~lunch_home(X0) | remote(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define schedule_meeting(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define go_to_building(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define in_other_country(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
